China’s first domestically developed ton-class cargo drone, the Tianma-1000, has completed its maiden flight. Capable of carrying 1 tonne up to 1,800 km, it’s designed for logistics, disaster relief, and supply drops—even in hard-to-reach areas.

data.title: Technip Energies sets dates for reporting full-year 2025 and quarterly 2026 results.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the local government has allocated a total budget of $5 million to support small business recovery efforts in the area. The funding will be distributed through grants ranging from $5,000 to $50,000 each, depending on the size and scope of the business. Eligible businesses must have less than 50 employees and have experienced financial hardship due to the ongoing pandemic. The application process is set to open next month, and interested parties are encouraged to prepare the necessary documentation in advance. The aim of this initiative is to stimulate economic growth and help local businesses bounce back from the challenges brought on by the pandemic.

data.title: JetNet promotes Josh Baird to President and COO; leading provider of aviation data; Utica, NY; effective Jan 12, 2026.
data.description: In Utica, New York, on January 12, 2026, JETNET, a top aviation data and market insight provider, revealed the appointment of Josh Baird as the new President and Chief Operating Officer. Baird, formerly the Chief Operating Officer, has been promoted to this role and will maintain his reporting responsibilities.

data.title: Aeronero awarded Frost & Sullivan's 2025 Global Transformational Innovation Leadership for pioneering atmospheric water generation tech.
data.description: Aeronero, a company based in San Antonio, has been acknowledged by Frost & Sullivan for their innovative approach to water security. This recognition is for their pioneering hybrid atmospheric water generation technology that has proven to be a sustainable solution. The award was given in 2025 on a global level, showcasing the impact of Aeronero's work. This recognition highlights the importance of their breakthrough technology in addressing water shortages and the need for sustainable water solutions.

data.title: LumiNicole adds Linda Johansen-James and Fred Collins to Advisory Board; plans 40 automated stores in 2026.
data.description: Experienced professionals from the industry have recently been added to the Advisory Board of LumiNicole as the company gears up to open 40 automated retail stores and expand its alternative beauty and wellness marketplace across the country. The announcement was made in Las Vegas on January 12, 2026. LumiNicole is positioning itself as a next-generation player in the retail sector.

data.title: Toll Brothers introduces two new model homes in Camas, Washington. Grand opening on Jan 17, 2026.
data.description: The public is welcome to attend the grand opening event for the Brasada and Alderbook model homes in the Portland area on Saturday, January 17, 2026. This event marks the introduction of these housing options to potential buyers in the region. It presents an opportunity for interested parties to explore and evaluate these homes firsthand before making a decision. Join us on the specified date to experience the features and benefits of these new models and possibly find your dream home.

data.title: Kyrie Irving and ANTA release KAI3, kickstarting KAI 3.0 era, emphasizing renewal and discipline. Los Angeles, Jan 12, 2026.
data.description: The launch of KAI3 by Kyrie Irving and ANTA signifies more than just a new shoe design; it symbolizes a comeback centered around renewal, discipline, and comprehensive efforts to rebuild both in-game and outside. This introduction marks the beginning of the KAI 3.0 era, emphasizing a fresh start for Irving. Los Angeles, Jan. 12, 2026 - In a significant move, KAI3 reflects a blend of resurgence and focus as it represents Irving's return to the court.

data.title: Teva and Royalty Pharma secure $500M for development of skin disease drug TEV-408 targeting IL-15, with results expected in 2026.
data.description: Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. (NYSE: TEVA) and Royalty Pharma plc (NASDAQ: RPRX) have revealed a funding agreement worth up to $500 million to expedite the clinical development of Teva's anti-IL-15 antibody, TEV-'408. IL-15 plays a crucial role in numerous immune-mediated disease pathways. Data from the Phase 1b vitiligo study ongoing with TEV-'408 offers initial backing for IL-15 as a potential therapeutic target for treating various autoimmune conditions. Vitiligo is a persistent autoimmune skin disorder marked by the disappearance of pigment-producing cells (melanocytes), leading to white patches that can emerge anywhere on the body. Teva plans to disclose findings from TEV-'408 trials in 2026.

data.title: Advanced coatings & chemicals market to hit USD 485.40B by 2033, driven by sustainability demand.
data.description: In London on January 12, 2026, Strategic Revenue Insights Inc. reported a significant development in the Advanced Coatings and Functional Chemicals Market. The sector is experiencing rapid growth driven by data analytics, with industrial modernization and sustainability requirements fueling this momentum. The market is poised for expansion, with increasing performance standards playing a crucial role in this phase.

data.title: OutSee secures £2.5M seed funding, partners with o2h Discovery for lead drug target candidate.
data.description: OutSee, a leading genomics and drug discovery firm based in Cambridge, UK, has successfully concluded a seed funding round, raising a significant amount of £2.5 million. Alongside this milestone, the company has finalized a strategic partnership deal with o2h discovery, a well-established preclinical Contract Research Organisation renowned for its comprehensive drug discovery capabilities. This collaboration sets the stage for a joint drug discovery venture focused on OutSee's primary target candidate.

data.title: Axena Health partners with Mayo Clinic to enhance treatments for women with pelvic floor disorders, aiming for better care pathways and options.
data.description: Axena Health, Inc., based in Newton, Massachusetts, has recently extended its partnership with Mayo Clinic to enhance the development of innovative solutions for women's pelvic health conditions. This collaboration aims to introduce new treatments to improve care for women with pelvic floor disorders. The expanded partnership seeks to boost treatment options and enhance adherence to care pathways. Through this collaboration, Axena Health aims to redefine care standards for pelvic health conditions by leveraging clinically proven, non-invasive treatments. This development signals a significant step towards addressing the needs of women with pelvic health issues and potentially revolutionizing the treatment landscape for these conditions.
